ops.name: sandbox.acquire
ops.summary: Provision a sandbox container plus daemon and return its sandbox_id.

ops.name: sandbox.release
ops.summary: Destroy the sandbox container and drop its registry entry.

ops.name: sandbox.status
ops.summary: Host view of one sandbox (container/endpoint/recovery state) plus embedded daemon readiness.

ops.name: sandbox.list
ops.summary: Enumerate the sandbox registry.

ops.name: sandbox.runtime.ready
ops.summary: Daemon readiness probe used by the host recovery machine.

ops.name: sandbox.call.heartbeat
ops.summary: Extend the lease on an in-flight invocation.

ops.name: sandbox.call.cancel
ops.summary: Request cooperative cancellation of an in-flight invocation.

ops.name: sandbox.call.count
ops.summary: Count in-flight invocations.

ops.name: sandbox.trace.export
ops.summary: Drain bounded daemon background trace records for host ingest.

ops.name: sandbox.checkpoint.layer_metrics
ops.summary: Report LayerStack and storage metrics for the sandbox.

ops.name: sandbox.checkpoint.ensure_base
ops.summary: Ensure a workspace base binding exists.

ops.name: sandbox.checkpoint.build_base
ops.summary: Build or rebuild a workspace base binding.

ops.name: sandbox.checkpoint.commit_to_workspace
ops.summary: Materialize LayerStack state into the bound workspace.

ops.name: sandbox.checkpoint.commit_to_git
ops.summary: Commit a LayerStack snapshot into the bound workspace's durable Git repo.

ops.name: sandbox.checkpoint.binding
ops.summary: Inspect the workspace binding for a layer stack root.

ops.name: sandbox.file.read
ops.summary: Read one file from the layer stack or isolated workspace.

ops.name: sandbox.file.write
ops.summary: Write one file through the OCC gate.

ops.name: sandbox.file.edit
ops.summary: Edit one file through the OCC gate.

ops.name: sandbox.plugin.ensure
ops.summary: Ensure a plugin service is installed and running.

ops.name: sandbox.plugin.status
ops.summary: Inspect plugin service status.

ops.name: sandbox.isolation.enter
ops.summary: Enter isolated workspace mode for a caller.

ops.name: sandbox.isolation.exit
ops.summary: Exit isolated workspace mode for a caller.

ops.name: sandbox.isolation.status
ops.summary: Inspect isolated workspace status.

ops.name: sandbox.isolation.list_open
ops.summary: List open isolated workspaces.

ops.name: sandbox.isolation.test_reset
ops.summary: Test-only isolated workspace reset hook.

ops.name: sandbox.command.exec
ops.summary: Run a foreground command or start a background command.

ops.name: sandbox.command.write_stdin
ops.summary: Write stdin to a command.

ops.name: sandbox.command.poll
ops.summary: Poll command progress without writing stdin.

ops.name: sandbox.command.cancel
ops.summary: Cancel a command.

ops.name: sandbox.command.collect_completed
ops.summary: Collect completed command notifications.

ops.name: sandbox.command.count
ops.summary: Count live commands.

ops.name: sandbox.run.end
ops.summary: End a run: cancel every workspace run owned by one caller (caller_id == agent_run_id), discarding its commands and exiting its isolated workspace.

ops.name: sandbox.run.cancel_all
ops.summary: Cancel every workspace run in the sandbox: the whole-sandbox sweep backstop.
